name: Strawberry Fields REIT, Inc.
business: Strawberry Fields REIT, Inc. is a self-managed and self-administered real estate company that specializes in the acquisition, ownership and triple-net leasing of skilled nursing facilities and other post-acute healthcare properties. As of December 31, 2025, its portfolio consisted of 133 healthcare properties with an aggregate of 15,602 licensed beds, located across ten U.S. states. It generates substantially all of its revenues by leasing its properties to tenants under long-term triple-net leases.
sellsTo: Healthcare operators of skilled nursing facilities

exposures.sentence: We are a self-managed and self-administered real estate company that specializes in the acquisition, ownership and triple-net leasing of skilled nursing facilities and other post-acute healthcare properties.
